market_context: X sentiment shows mild bullishness toward tech and AI names with NVDA and MSFT seeing positive volume in mentions, while macro caution around yields tempers broader enthusiasm. Pre-market futures point to a flat-to-up open with limited major news catalysts expected today.

predictions.reasoning: SPY closed at 754.95 after a 1.4% five-day gain; X chatter and futures lean positive into open with no major negative catalysts.
QQQ's 1.8% five-day advance and continued AI-related optimism on X support further upside into today's session.
NVDA benefits from sustained positive X volume and sector momentum despite VIX at 16.46 signaling mild caution.
TSLA shows relative weakness versus the broader tape and mixed X sentiment around delivery numbers.
